languages.text: "Восславим же Бога-Машину, ниспославшего нам крупицу своей мудрости через помазанника своего! Благословен будь, Омниссия!"

traits.locale_text: "Восславим же Бога-Машину, ниспославшего нам крупицу своей мудрости через помазанника своего! Благословен будь, Омниссия!"

languages.text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"
languages.original_text: "Восславим же Бога-Машину, ниспославшего нам крупицу своей мудрости через помазанника своего! Благословен будь, Омниссия!"

traits.locale_text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"
"Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"
"Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"

languages.text: 「機械神に感謝しましょう。彼の使徒を通して、彼の知恵の一粒を授けてくださいました。万能なる神に祝福あれ！」
languages.original_text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"

languages.text: "Seçilmiş kulu aracılığıyla bize bilgeliğinden bir zerre bahşeden Makine Tanrı'ya şükürler olsun! Hermesih'e şükürler olsun!"
languages.original_text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: "Seçilmiş kulu aracılığıyla bize bilgeliğinden bir zerre bahşeden Makine Tanrı'ya şükürler olsun! Hermesih'e şükürler olsun!"

languages.text: “赞颂万机之神！赞颂祂借由神选者赐予我们的一丝智慧！欧姆尼赛亚永受尊荣！”
languages.original_text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: “赞颂万机之神！赞颂祂借由神选者赐予我们的一丝智慧！欧姆尼赛亚永受尊荣！”

languages.text: "Lasst und den Maschinengott preisen, der uns einen Funken Seiner Weisheit durch {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} gewährt hat! Gesegnet sei der Omnissiah!"
languages.original_text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: "Lasst und den Maschinengott preisen, der uns einen Funken Seiner Weisheit durch {mf|Seinen Gesalbten|Seine Gesalbte} gewährt hat! Gesegnet sei der Omnissiah!"

languages.text: « Loué soit le Dieu-Machine qui nous a accordé une once de Sa sagesse par l'intermédiaire de Son {mf|élu|élue} ! Béni soit l'Omnimessie ! »
languages.original_text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: « Loué soit le Dieu-Machine qui nous a accordé une once de Sa sagesse par l'intermédiaire de Son {mf|élu|élue} ! Béni soit l'Omnimessie ! »

languages.text: «¡Alabemos al Dios Máquina, que nos ha dado una migaja de su sabiduría a través de su ungido! ¡Bendito sea el Omnissiah!».
languages.original_text: "Let us praise the Machine God who has granted us a grain of His wisdom through His anointed one! Blessed be the Omnissiah!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Alabemos al Dios Máquina, que nos ha dado una migaja de su sabiduría a través de su ungido! ¡Bendito sea el Omnissiah!».
